name: shared-memory
description: Local SQLite-backed shared memory for Codex and MCP agents. Exposes focused memory tools for write, read, search, map, suggestion, relation, snapshot, audit, and bulk workflows.

interface.shortDescription: SQLite shared memory tools for Codex agents
interface.longDescription: Shared Memory provides a local SQLite-backed memory graph for Codex and MCP-compatible agents. It supports durable memory entries, metadata search, graph maps, semantic suggestions when enabled, snapshots, audits, and bulk writes through a stdio MCP adapter.
defaultPrompt: Use shared memory to save this project decision.
Search shared memory before planning this change.
Audit shared memory for stale or duplicate notes.
